problem id: 046e8532
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3)

examples:
  10000111 -> 00111100
  00110000 -> 10000001
  11001101 -> 01101110
  01011011 -> 11011010
  11110111 -> 10111111
  00100001 -> 00001001
  00001110 -> 01110000
  11010111 -> 10111110
  01001111 -> 01111010

query: 10000011
predicted answer: 00011100
